hero.welcome: Welcome to Mrs. Mirna Nabil, science becomes fun with her!
hero.subtitle: Since 2008, helping students excel in science with clear plans, simple explanations, and real follow-up.

home.whyTitle: Professional science teaching with a friendly student-first approach
home.whySubtitle: We combine conceptual understanding, practical examples, and continuous follow-up.

features.labText: Concepts are explained through experiments, diagrams, and simple models.
features.methodText: Study plans, homework, short quizzes, and structured revision.
features.followText: Progress reports and clear communication with parents.

home.ctaTitle: Want your child to love science and score higher?
home.ctaText: Book a trial lesson and discover a clear teaching style tailored to the student level.

about.title: About Mrs. Mirna Nabil
about.subtitle: A science teacher with long experience simplifying hard concepts into clear steps.
about.bioText: I have worked with thousands of students at different levels, always focusing on understanding before memorization.
